G Telepathy — Auth Router Uses Supabase Auth. No passwords are stored in our DB.

Authenticates a user with Supabase Auth.     Returns access + refresh tokens.
Invalidates the user's session token in Supabase.
Returns the authenticated user's profile. Requires a valid Bearer token.
